pillLabel.purpose: Column status pill text - small, bold, uppercase, tracked.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Card resting state. Reintroduced this pass after the previous flat-design era's shadow ban.

shadows.name: shadow-md
shadows.purpose: Card hover, paired with translateY(-2px) lift.

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Dropdown menu - needs to read clearly as floating.

shadows.name: shadow-focus
shadows.purpose: Focus ring, unaffected by the elevation system either way.

motion.name: transition-fast
motion.purpose: Hover states, menu open/close, press feedback.

components.name: Column Card
components.description: A single task card. Lifts on hover (translateY(-2px) + deeper shadow) - a tactile 'picked up' feel matching the reference screenshots.
components.html:
Fix login redirect

Users land on 404 after OAuth callback

Jul 2
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e4e7ec; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; padding: 16px; border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(23,43,77,0.08); cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #c7cdd6; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(23,43,77,0.1); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card:active { transform: translateY(-2px) scale(0.98); } .ds-card-title { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; color: #172b4d; line-height: 1; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #5e6c84; } .ds-card-date { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #63707f; }

components.name: Column Header
components.description: Colored title pill (status wash background, saturated text, uppercase small bold) plus a separate NEUTRAL count badge - the two-part header pattern from the reference screenshots. Status color lives only on the pill, never the count badge or column body (Pill-Not-Column Rule).
components.css: .ds-column-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-title-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.03em; } .ds-title-pill-todo { background-color: rgba(29,78,216,0.1); color: #1d4ed8; } .ds-title-pill-progress { background-color: rgba(180,83,9,0.1); color: #b45309; } .ds-title-pill-done { background-color: rgba(21,128,61,0.1); color: #15803d; } .ds-count-badge { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 999px; background-color: #e4e7ec; color: #172b4d; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Dropdown Menu
components.description: The column '...' action menu, with a destructive item variant. Shadow-based separation, reintroduced this pass.
components.css: .ds-menu { display: flex; flex-direction: column; background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e4e7ec; border-radius: 10px; box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(23,43,77,0.14); padding: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; width: 160px; transform-origin: top right; } .ds-menu-item { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; color: #172b4d; cursor: pointer; background: none; border: none; text-align: left; transition: background-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; } .ds-menu-item:hover { background-color: #f4f5f7; } .ds-menu-item:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-menu-item-danger:hover { color: #dc2626; background-color: rgba(220,38,38,0.1); }

components.name: New Task Button
components.description: Full-width ghost button at the bottom of each column.
components.css: .ds-new-task { display: flex; width: 100%; gap: 3px; justify-content: center; align-items: center; background: none; border: none; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: #5e6c84; padding-top: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-new-task:hover { color: #5b4fe0; } .ds-new-task:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

narrative.overview: This is the fifth visual era the board has gone through in one day (2026-07-02): indigo-dark colorize, brass-gold-dark, structural Linear-elegance, ui-ux-pro-max flat light, and this one - built to match two reference screenshots the user provided directly (Trello/Asana-style boards). The references show white cards lifting off a light neutral-gray page via real shadow, generous rounded corners, colorful pill-shaped status labels, comment/attachment metadata, avatar stacks, and a dark sidebar. This app's actual data model is much simpler - no tags, comments, attachments, priority, or sidebar/workspace concept. The user explicitly chose visual-style-only, real-data-only scope: adopt the reference's card materiality and color language, but style only title/description/status/date. No fabricated tags, avatars, counts, or sidebar. A real, previously-invisible bug got fixed during this pass: the in_progress status value (snake_case) never matched the inProgress (camelCase) CSS modifier classes used since the first redesign pass, so the In Progress column silently never received its status color in any prior era - fixed by renaming CSS classes to match the real data value.
keyCharacteristics: Real elevation is back - shadows tinted toward the text-primary navy hue, used for actual depth (card rest/hover, floating menu)
Cards lift on hover (translateY(-2px) plus a deeper shadow) - a tactile 'picked up' feel
Column status is a colored pill around the title, not a wash on the column or a plain dot
A neutral count badge is separate from the colored title pill - two-part header matching the reference
Radius is generous again (10-14px), reversing the previous era's 0-4px ceiling
One accent (violet) distinct from all three status hues (blue/orange/green)

rules.name: The Pill-Not-Column Rule
rules.body: Status color lives on the column's title pill only - never the column body or the task-count badge, which stays neutral gray. Matches the reference's two-part header.

rules.name: The Shadow-Tint Rule
rules.body: Every shadow is tinted toward text-primary's navy hue (rgba(23,43,77,...)), never pure black. Reads as soft ambient depth on a cool-neutral page, not a harsh cutout.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Every text role uses Plus Jakarta Sans. The pill label's uppercase treatment is the one deliberate exception to no-all-caps, earned because it's a small deliberate chip label.

dos: Do use real shadow (tinted navy) for card and menu elevation.
Do keep status color on the title pill only, never the column body or count badge.
Do lift cards on hover (translateY + deeper shadow) - the tactile feel is part of matching the reference.
Do style only real data (title, description, date, status). Treat tags/avatars/comments/sidebar asks as a scope question, not an automatic yes.
donts: Don't fabricate placeholder tags, avatars, comment/attachment counts, or a sidebar shell - the user explicitly chose real-data-only scope. Flag the gap instead of mocking it.
Don't reintroduce the previous era's shadow ban or 0-4px radius ceiling.

Don't assume a status modifier class works just because it's spelled consistently elsewhere - verify it matches the real data value. The inProgress/in_progress mismatch silently broke styling for one column across four prior eras.
Don't color the task-count badge - it stays neutral so the title pill is the only status signal.
